notes: RESET 2026-07-24: per explicit user request, live trading is now consolidated to Margin-Style only after multi-frequency backtesting showed it as the sole system with consistent (3/5 window) profitability at every check frequency, while 9-Way Combo and Day-Trading LIVE showed only 1-2/5 window consistency. The 9-Way Combo LIVE trigger (trig_01AZXmLrvMg4B1Gka5kreqcR) and Day-Trading LIVE trigger (trig_01GY1mk2Eo68gMX5YdS34zGW) were disabled the same day. All 5 of 9-Way Combo's real positions (AMD/MU/WDC/SNDK/TSM) were liquidated to free their capital (realized ~-$181.68); Day-Trading LIVE held no positions. Margin-Style Live now sizes against the full $5,000. Both paper trackers (9-Way/swing paper, day-trading paper) keep running unaffected so either system can be re-evaluated and brought back live later. Original equal 3-way split notes (2026-07-22) superseded by this entry.
